description.value: Aura faint enchantment; CL 1st; Slot hands; Price 2,200 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION These supple, velvet gloves are the sort that might be thrown down in challenge for a duel or other single combat. By removing a glove and using it to make a melee or ranged touch attack against an opponent, the wearer of the other glove gains a +1 morale bonus on attack rolls against the target, and the target gains a â1 penalty on attack rolls against the wearer. Both of these effects last for 1 minute, but immediately end if anyone but the gloveâs wearer attacks the challenged opponent. Both gloves must be worn by the same creature. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bane, bless; Cost 1,100 gp.
